pattern: Each senator in turn bans the next opposing senator who would act after them, modeled by two queues of indices cycled forward by the senator count.
hints: Process senators in the original order, repeatedly.
When a senator acts, they should ban the soonest-to-act senator of the other party.
Keep one index queue per party; the front-most index acts, bans the other party's front, and re-enters at the back offset by n.

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(10000, size))
    s = ''.join(rng.choice('RD') for _ in range(n))
    return [s]
